MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Fred M. Feller, Esq., (510-548-7474) for James Delameter, Defendant and moving party
Jaymee Faith Sagisi, Esq., (415-773-1240) of Greenstein & McDonald, for Peter Asjana, Plaintiff and opposing party.

ARGUED. Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:
DEFENDANT JAMES DELAMETER, VIOLA DELAMETER MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT is DENIED. Triable issues of material fact exist at least as to fact No. 10 (See Ex. 15) and reasonableness of Defendants belief under CCP 1951.3. Order is signed in open court. Judge: Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D501)
